mapper.select:
select
from knowledge_base where user_id = #{ownerUserId} and deleted_at is null and status = 1
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and category = #{category}
and concat(',', ifnull(tags, ''), ',') like concat('%,', #{tag}, ',%')
order by updated_at desc, id desc
